LanguageData.FB_FleshConvergenceBulbfreakDesc: Call nearby allied fingerspikes, trispikes, and toughspikes into a violent convergence, forming a controllable bulbfreak with the host sealed inside.
LanguageData.FB_FleshConvergenceCarrionArchitectDesc: Call nearby allied fingerspikes, trispikes, and toughspikes into a slow, massive carrion architect that can reshape organic corpses into new fingerspikes.
LanguageData.FB_FleshConvergenceChromophageDesc: Call nearby allied fingerspikes, trispikes, and toughspikes into a gene-harvesting chromophage that can strip genetic traces from humanlike corpses and unload them into a genome archive.
LanguageData.FB_FleshConvergencePersonalityDevourerDe: Call nearby allied fingerspikes, trispikes, and toughspikes into a memory-eating form that consumes intact-brained humanlike corpses and records them in the colony brain.
LanguageData.FB_FleshConvergenceLockedDesc: This convergence pattern has not formed yet.
LanguageData.FB_FleshConvergenceFormLocked: This convergence form is not available yet.
LanguageData.FB_CarrionReworkInvalidCaster: Only a carrion architect can rework corpses.
LanguageData.FB_CarrionReworkMechanoidCorpse: Mechanoid corpses cannot be reworked into fleshbeasts.
LanguageData.FB_CarrionReworkNoLineOfSight: The carrion architect cannot reach that corpse with its tendrils.
LanguageData.FB_CarrionReworkCannotReach: The carrion architect cannot reach that corpse.
LanguageData.FB_CarrionReworkCannotStart: The carrion architect cannot begin reworking that corpse.
